title: Authentication, Passwords, Sessions, Cookies, and JOSE · Mastery Check
summary: A production review compares near-miss TypeScript decisions for authentication, passwords, sessions, cookies, and jose and demands the smallest safe credential verification and principal-construction contract with changed-input evidence. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for credential verification and principal-construction contract. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Apply modern password hashing, salt, work policy, input bounds, constant-behavior comparison, breach and reset controls, rehash migration, and secret separation.
Generate opaque session identifiers, store server-side state, rotate at authentication and privilege changes, expire idle and absolute lifetime, revoke, and prevent fixation.
Use jose verification with explicit algorithms, trusted keys, issuer, audience, expiration, not-before, clock tolerance, token type, and bounded claim validation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Node and Express server Password Verifier Policy · changed case · Quiz Password Verifier Policy
steps.instruction:
quiz case — A quiz team handles case 2158 in a multi-tenant case service with a bounded PostgreSQL pool. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to validate bounded token claims and session rotation before constructing a principal; preserve one tenant fairness invariant; then remove one trusted proxy hop and recompute authority from the socket boundary. Browser code models pure decisions only. Node, Express, listener, TLS, PostgreSQL, proxy, worker, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

Which action demonstrates Password Verifier Policy without dropping earlier contracts?

Evidence target: Node and Express server Password Verifier Policy · changed case · Quiz Password Verifier Policy.

checks.description: The decision applies Authentication Principal Audit to the changed stakeholder case.

checks.description: The evidence note explains the model, failure risk, and verification in the learner’s own words.
